posts.raw_content:
Yes-- this is a post about Joe Kent's claim-- that Kash Patel's FBI behaved in a territorial manner-- by blocking-out counter-terrorism intelligence investigation-- of possible Foreign Involvement in the assassination of Charlie Kirk.

I am NOT saying there was Foreign Involvement.   i AM saying the FBI reacted-to Joe Kent accessing the FBI's case file on the Charlie Kirk assassination-- by shutting-down Kent's access to the file.   And Joe Kent was President Trump's Counter-terrorism Chief!

FURTHERMORE-- the FBI then told President Trump a lie: that Kent had leaked secret govt software to a reporter named Steve Baker.   Baker was making the FBI look bad-- for failing to catch the J6 Pipebomber.   How? Well, Baker was using gait-recognition software-- to independently identify the bomber.  

Baker DIDN'T TRUST THE FBI (nor should he!).   So he kept them out of the loop of his investigation.   So they didn't know that Baker was using privately-developed software/ not govt tech.    The FBI -did- get wind of that software being in Joe Kent's hands.  So they accused Kent of leaking the software to Baker.   BUT-- the actual handoff was the Other Way Around:  Baker gave the software ~TO~ Kent and ~TO~ O.D.N.I. Tulsi Gabbard-- so the govt could identify the J6 bomber...   without the FBI sabotaging the case... as they had done with Hunter Biden's Laptop, the Lawfare against Trump, many such examples.

So the FBI lied to Trump-- saying Joe Kent was a leaker.  And Trump believed the FBI-- shutting Joe Kent out his briefings, for months.  And so Joe Kent was unable to make the case that Striking Iran wouldn't be as easy as Israeli intelligence was claiming.

I THINK JOE KENT'S RESIGNATION LETTER DID NOT HIT "BULLSEYE".   One can see how-- from Kent's point of view-- it appeared "The Israelis" were the reason Kent was shut-out from briefing the President.   But, really, it was THE FBI.

IF you want to claim the FBI/ Deep State/ and neo-con zionist agenda are All The Same Thing... fine... that's not an insane Theory Of The Case.

BUT... the only part which is 100% clear... is THE FBI's culpability.

Here's another long post-- on the same subject-- including a link to Steve Baker breaking the story of how he CAUGHT THE FBI lying to the President and FBI LEAKING a lie to the press-- that Joe Kent was a leaker (when he was not.)... https://patriots.win/p/1ASZ3cpCr9/the-fbi-vs-donald-trump--the-ame/c
